section_name: Notice to Appear: Commercial Vehicle or License
text: A notice to appear issued to the operator of a commercial motor vehicle or holder of a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit, for the violation of a law regulating the operation of vehicles on highways, must contain the information required by department rule, to comply with Chapter 522 (Commercial Driver’s Licenses) and the federal Commercial Motor Vehicle Safety Act of 1986 (Title 49, U.S.C. Section 2701 et seq.).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.007 — Notice to Appear: Commercial Vehicle or License

A notice to appear issued to the operator of a commercial motor vehicle or holder of a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit, for the violation of a law regulating the operation of vehicles on highways, must contain the information required by department rule, to comply with Chapter 522 (Commercial Driver’s Licenses) and the federal Commercial Motor Vehicle Safety Act of 1986 (Title 49, U.S.C. Section 2701 et seq.).

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 752 (H.B.1888), Sec. 38, eff. January 1, 2016.*

Section 2701 et seq.).
